summary: Finanzas module fixes verified. Backend: 12/13 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All features working correctly - overview shows only 5 real units, charge/payment dialogs use unit dropdowns, delete charge button visible in resident detail, Estados de Cuenta tab functional.

issues: A-103 and B-201 show 'Sin residente asignado' - may need resident assignment

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/finanzas/overview correctly filters to only 5 real units (A-101, A-102, A-103, B-201, B-202)
DELETE /api/finanzas/charges/{id} endpoint working - admin can delete charges, balance recalculates
ChargeDialog uses unit dropdown selector (not free text input)
PaymentDialog uses unit dropdown selector (not free text input)
ResidentAccountsTab detail view shows delete buttons on individual charges
Resident names display correctly in Cuentas por Unidad table (A-101: Test Residente OK, A-102: Residente de Prueba)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Finanzas module fully tested. Overview endpoint now correctly filters to only real units from the 'units' collection. Delete charge endpoint works with balance recalculation. Frontend dialogs use unit dropdowns. Estados de Cuenta tab shows resident list with balances and detail view includes delete charge buttons.
